rows.label: qev092203_MSG0001
rows.name: You're finally here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0001_2
rows.name:
Caravan was attacked again while
waiting for you to arrive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0002
rows.name:
The Pollen Orbs got stolen, and
Lularita got injured! It was awful-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev092203_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about Lularita's injury.

rows.label: qev092203_JNK0020
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev092203_SEL0021
rows.name: Point out that she doesn't look injured.

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0003
rows.name:
Lularita is the caravan's number
one warrior! An injury like
this won't get me down-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0004
rows.name:
A scrape that takes three days
to heal[ST:wide ]— I want you to make
them pay dearly for this-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0005
rows.name:
Look closely-mo! My arm's
scraped right here-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0006
rows.name:
Monsters very powerful to inflict such
grave harm on best warrior of caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'll tell you the location,
so hurry up and go to its
nest and take care of it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0008
rows.name:
Yes. We'll do our best so the
Nopon can live in peace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0009
rows.name:
If I'm with you, I'm sure we
can manage somehow[ST:wide ]— Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev092203_SEL0031
rows.name: Say you'll handle it.

rows.label: qev092203_JNK0040
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev092203_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say that if you don't cooperate
together, you can't win.

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0010
rows.name:
It's the first time someone's said
something like that to me[ST:wide ]— I'm very happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0011
rows.name:
Being able to rely on someone like
this is really wonderful, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0012
rows.name:
You're right. I will protect
you no matter what.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0013
rows.name: Okay[ST:wide ]— Let's depart then.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0014
rows.name:
That thing is an outrageous monster
that even Lularita, the caravan's
#1 warrior, can't handle-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0015
rows.name:
I don't know if even you guys can win[ST:wide ]—
Prepare properly before you go-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ohh! You're back safely-mo!
How'd it go-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0017
rows.name: Did you avenge Lularita's injury-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0018
rows.name:
es. I believe this caravan will no longer
be attacked by those native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0019
rows.name:
Well done-mo! Asking you was
really the right choice-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0020
rows.name:
Wow~ And since it was free, it's
super convenient and great-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0020_2
rows.name: I'll ask again sometime-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_JNK0050
rows.name: Get Angry

rows.label: qev092203_SEL0051
rows.name: Get angry at the rude Lularita.

rows.label: qev092203_JNK0060
rows.name: Agreement

rows.label: qev092203_SEL0061
rows.name:
Cheerfully say, "Leave
it to us anytime."

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0021
rows.name:
Nn? What are you being grumpy about,
mo? There's nothing more wonderful
than getting freebies, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0021_m
rows.name:
Nn? What are you being grrumpy
about, mo? There's nothing more
wonderful than getting freebies, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0021_f
rows.name:
Nn? What are you being grumpy about,
mo? There's nothing more wonderful
than getting freebies, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0022
rows.name:
Heheh. That's true. That's a
very Nopon way of thinking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0023
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Um... Thank you for being
considerate of my feelings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0024
rows.name:
Other than Ornela-san, you're
the first person to treat me
with such consideration[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0025
rows.name:
I'm often told I'm too nice/a pushover,
but you're quite the same, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0026
rows.name:
There are still lots of troublesome
things-mo~! You're a great help-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0027
rows.name:
From fixing a leaky roof to
washing piles of laundry[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0028
rows.name:
Journeying this far together
with you was truly wonderful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0029
rows.name:
I'd like to try working together
like this again sometime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0030
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Well then, for now, let's
head back to Ornela-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0031
rows.name:
Because I must properly thank
you for being so kind to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0032
rows.name:
Even among Nopon, the girl
Himeri who'll listen to anything
was becoming a rumor-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0033
rows.name:
Lularita will definitely be
back to NLA to ask for more,
so look forward to that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092203_MSG0034
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—Ah! For free, of course-mo![ST:wait ]
